top_comment.author: Roman Leventov
top_comment.text: I think that LLM consists of typical cognitive architecture elements: world model, cost model, executive controller and planner, all amalgamated together in this big mess. From this perspective, fine-tuning LLMs for dialogue I think imparts their executive component with communicative intent.
top_comment.claim: The comment's point: I think that LLM consists of typical cognitive architecture elements: world model, cost model, executive controller and planner, all amalgamated together in this big mess.
